output.sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?movie ?movieLabel ?grossAmount WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
  ?movie wdt:P123 wd:Q58695 .
  ?movie wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  ?movie wdt:P2191 ?grossQuantity .
  ?grossQuantity wikibase:quantityAmount ?grossAmount .
  FILTER(?releaseDate > "2010-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?movie rdfs:label ?movieLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?movieLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grossAmount)
